ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expeditions" (
  "expedition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expedition */,
  "expedition_name" TEXT /* Name of the expedition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the expedition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the expedition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the expedition */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Name of the project lead */,
  "research_vessel" TEXT /* Name of the research vessel */,
  "expedition_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the expedition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expedition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cores" (
  "core_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each core */,
  "expedition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expedition during which the core was collected */,
  "core_name" TEXT /* Name of the core */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the core */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the core location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the core location */,
  "core_length" REAL /* Length of the core */,
  "core_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the core */,
  "core_type" TEXT /* Type of the core */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("core_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cores_expedition_id FOREIGN KEY ("expedition_id") REFERENCES expeditions ("expedition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "core_id" INTEGER /* ID of the core to which the section belongs */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "top_interval_depth" REAL /* Top interval depth of the section */,
  "bottom_interval_depth" REAL /* Bottom interval depth of the section */,
  "section_length" REAL /* Length of the section */,
  "section_description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_core_id FOREIGN KEY ("core_id") REFERENCES cores ("core_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsection" (
  "subsection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsection */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section to which the subsection belongs */,
  "subsection_name" TEXT /* Name of the subsection */,
  "top_interval_depth" REAL /* Top interval depth of the subsection */,
  "bottom_interval_depth" REAL /* Bottom interval depth of the subsection */,
  "subsection_length" REAL /* Length of the subsection */,
  "subsection_description" TEXT /* Description of the subsection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsection_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lithology" (
  "lithology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lithology entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section to which the lithology entry belongs */,
  "lithology_description" TEXT /* Description of the lithology */,
  "lithology_codes" TEXT /* Lithology codes */,
  "rock_type" TEXT /* Type of rock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lithology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lithology_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section to which the color entry belongs */,
  "color_description" TEXT /* Description of the color */,
  "color_codes" TEXT /* Color codes */,
  "color_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structure entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section to which the structure entry belongs */,
  "structure_description" TEXT /* Description of the structure */,
  "structure_codes" TEXT /* Structure codes */,
  "structure_type" TEXT /* Type of structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structures_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deformations" (
  "deformation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deformation entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section to which the deformation entry belongs */,
  "deformation_description" TEXT /* Description of the deformation */,
  "deformation_codes" TEXT /* Deformation codes */,
  "deformationSeverity" TEXT /* Severity of the deformation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deformation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deformations_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unusual_occurrences" (
  "occurrence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occurrence entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section to which the occurrence entry belongs */,
  "occurrence_description" TEXT /* Description of the occurrence */,
  "occurrence_codes" TEXT /* Occurrence codes */,
  "occurrence_type" TEXT /* Type of occurrence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occurrence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unusual_occurrences_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "minerals" (
  "mineral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mineral entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section to which the mineral entry belongs */,
  "mineral_description" TEXT /* Description of the mineral */,
  "mineral_codes" TEXT /* Mineral codes */,
  "mineral_type" TEXT /* Type of mineral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mineral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_minerals_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paleontology" (
  "paleontology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paleontology entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section to which the paleontology entry belongs */,
  "paleontology_description" TEXT /* Description of the paleontology */,
  "paleontology_codes" TEXT /* Paleontology codes */,
  "paleontology_type" TEXT /* Type of paleontology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paleontology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paleontology_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section to which the observation entry belongs */,
  "observation_description" TEXT /* Description of the observation */,
  "observation_codes" TEXT /* Observation codes */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_observations_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardness_induration" (
  "hardness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardness entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section to which the hardness entry belongs */,
  "hardness_description" TEXT /* Description of the hardness */,
  "hardness_codes" TEXT /* Hardness codes */,
  "hardness_type" TEXT /* Type of hardness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hardness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardness_induration_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section to which the image belongs */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)
